name: Kintsugi
description: AI-powered sales tax compliance platform with automated registration and filing.

seo.title: Kintsugi — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Kintsugi: AI-powered sales tax compliance platform with automated registration and filing.

when_to_use: Automated US sales tax registration and filing for SaaS and e-commerce
AI-powered nexus detection and economic threshold monitoring
Sales tax compliance without manual state registration work
Automated tax calculation and remittance for multi-state US sellers

pros: Automates US sales tax registration and filing
Fast onboarding for SaaS and e-commerce
cons: Young product — some edge cases still rough
Pricing can surprise as states multiply
Less battle-tested than Avalara or TaxJar
review.verdict: Promising modern alternative to legacy US sales tax tools — fast to start, still proving depth.
review.best_for: US SaaS and e-commerce companies needing hands-off nexus tracking and filing.
review.not_for: Businesses with heavy international VAT/GST exposure or very complex product taxability.
